name: Vineshade
bio:
Controller of the Net of Secrets, a Plantfolk born in a mysterious forest. He has a deep connection with plants and uses plant abilities to fight for the Net of Secrets.

Role: Magical Corrosion
Specialty: A mid-backline Control-type hero that can reduce enemy damage and apply Corrosion effects; can amplify allies' Corrosion damage.

skillSlots.name: Verdant Toxic Smog
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemy targets, dealing 130% M.DMG.

skillSlots.name: Wrath of Nature
skillSlots.description: Deals 140% M.DMG to all enemies with 30% probability to apply 1 stack of [Infect].

effects.name: Toxic Aura
effects.description: [Wrath of Nature]'s [Infect] application chance increased to 40%.
